title: ansellia africana subsp. australis
intro: Ansellia africana subsp. australis, commonly known as the Silver King, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ansellia africana subsp. australis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tinctures.
